revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== {{tl|Wikispecies}} * Create link to [[Wikispecies]]. ==Advanced usage== ::{| |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''}}||– puts link-box connecting title ''pagename''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|''showname''}}||– puts link-box showing the title ''showname''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|3=position=left}}||– floats link-box to the left side. |} where: * ''pagename'' is the WikiSpecies article to link to. Defaults to '''PAGENAME''' (the Wikipedia article's title) * ''showname'' is the text to display with the above link. Defaults to ''pagename''. * The {{para|position}} parameter accepts one keyword, left, to float the box to the left instead of to the right. ==Example== {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns without floating left.''' This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the ==External links== section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article, or use {{tlx|Wikispecies-inline}}. See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Creates a small box with a links to an article on Wikispecies.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Page name", "description": "The page name on Wikispecies. The article's page name is used as a default.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "2": { "label": "Displayed name", "description": "Optional displayed link text.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "position": { "label": "Position", "description": "Position to display the box: 'left' floats the box to the left rather than the default which is on the right.", "type": "string", "required": false } }} ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== {{tl|Wikispecies}} * Create link to [[:en:Wikispecies|Wikispecies]]. ==Advanced usage== ::{| |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''}}||– puts link-box connecting title ''pagename''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|''showname''}}||– puts link-box showing the title ''showname''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|3=position=left}}||– floats link-box to the left side. |} where: * ''pagename'' is the WikiSpecies article to link to. Defaults to '''PAGENAME''' (the Wikipedia article's title) * ''showname'' is the text to display with the above link. Defaults to ''pagename''. * The {{para|position}} parameter accepts one keyword, left, to float the box to the left instead of to the right. ==Example== {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns without floating left.''' This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the ==External links== section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article, or use {{tlx|Wikispecies-inline}}. See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Creates a small box with a links to an article on Wikispecies.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Page name", "description": "The page name on Wikispecies. The article's page name is used as a default.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "2": { "label": "Displayed name", "description": "Optional displayed link text.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "position": { "label": "Position", "description": "Position to display the box: 'left' floats the box to the left rather than the default which is on the right.", "type": "string", "required": false } }} ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== {{tl|Wikispecies}} * Create link to [[:en:Wikispecies|Wikispecies]]. ==Advanced usage== ::{| |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''}}||– puts link-box connecting title ''pagename''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|''showname''}}||– puts link-box showing the title ''showname''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|3=position=left}}||– floats link-box to the left side. |} where: * ''pagename'' is the WikiSpecies article to link to. Defaults to '''PAGENAME''' (the Wikipedia article's title) * ''showname'' is the text to display with the above link. Defaults to ''pagename''. * The {{para|position}} parameter accepts one keyword, left, to float the box to the left instead of to the right. ==Example== {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns without floating left.''' This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the ==External links== section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article, or use {{tlx|Wikispecies-inline}}. See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Creates a small box with a links to an article on Wikispecies.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Page name", "description": "The page name on Wikispecies. The article's page name is used as a default.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "2": { "label": "Displayed name", "description": "Optional displayed link text.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "position": { "label": "Position", "description": "Position to display the box: 'left' floats the box to the left rather than the default which is on the right.", "type": "string", "required": false } }} ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== {{tl|Wikispecies}} * Create link to [[:en:Wikispecies|Wikispecies]]. ==Advanced usage== ::{| |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''}}||– puts link-box connecting title ''pagename''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|''showname''}}||– puts link-box showing the title ''showname''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|3=position=left}}||– floats link-box to the left side. |} where: * ''pagename'' is the WikiSpecies article to link to. Defaults to '''PAGENAME''' (the Wikipedia article's title) * ''showname'' is the text to display with the above link. Defaults to ''pagename''. * The {{para|position}} parameter accepts one keyword, left, to float the box to the left instead of to the right. ==Example== {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns without floating left.''' This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the ==External links== section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article, or use {{tlx|Wikispecies-inline}}. See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Creates a small box with a links to an article on Wikispecies.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Page name", "description": "The page name on Wikispecies. The article's page name is used as a default.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "2": { "label": "Displayed name", "description": "Optional displayed link text.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "position": { "label": "Position", "description": "Position to display the box: 'left' floats the box to the left rather than the default which is on the right.", "type": "string", "required": false } }} ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== {{tl|Wikispecies}} * Create link to [[:en:Wikispecies|Wikispecies]]. ==Advanced usage== ::{| |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''}}||– puts link-box connecting title ''pagename''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|''showname''}}||– puts link-box showing the title ''showname''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|3=position=left}}||– floats link-box to the left side. |} where: * ''pagename'' is the WikiSpecies article to link to. Defaults to '''PAGENAME''' (the Wikipedia article's title) * ''showname'' is the text to display with the above link. Defaults to ''pagename''. * The {{para|position}} parameter accepts one keyword, left, to float the box to the left instead of to the right. ==Example== {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns without floating left.''' This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the ==External links== section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article, or use {{tlx|Wikispecies-inline}}. See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Creates a small box with a links to an article on Wikispecies.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Page name", "description": "The page name on Wikispecies. The article's page name is used as a default.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "2": { "label": "Displayed name", "description": "Optional displayed link text.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "position": { "label": "Position", "description": "Position to display the box: 'left' floats the box to the left rather than the default which is on the right.", "type": "string", "required": false } }} ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== {{tl|Wikispecies}} * Create link to [[:en:Wikispecies|Wikispecies]]. ==Advanced usage== ::{| |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''}}||– puts link-box connecting title ''pagename''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|''showname''}}||– puts link-box showing the title ''showname''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|3=position=left}}||– floats link-box to the left side. |} where: * ''pagename'' is the WikiSpecies article to link to. Defaults to '''PAGENAME''' (the Wikipedia article's title) * ''showname'' is the text to display with the above link. Defaults to ''pagename''. * The {{para|position}} parameter accepts one keyword, left, to float the box to the left instead of to the right. ==Example== {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns without floating left.''' This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the ==External links== section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article, or use {{tlx|Wikispecies-inline}}. See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Creates a small box with a links to an article on Wikispecies.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Page name", "description": "The page name on Wikispecies. The article's page name is used as a default.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "2": { "label": "Displayed name", "description": "Optional displayed link text.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "position": { "label": "Position", "description": "Position to display the box: 'left' floats the box to the left rather than the default which is on the right.", "type": "string", "required": false } }} ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== {{tl|Wikispecies}} * Create link to [[:en:Wikispecies|Wikispecies]]. ==Advanced usage== ::{| |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''}}||– puts link-box connecting title ''pagename''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|''showname''}}||– puts link-box showing the title ''showname''. |- | {{tlx|Wikispecies|''pagename''|3=position=left}}||– floats link-box to the left side. |} where: * ''pagename'' is the WikiSpecies article to link to. Defaults to '''PAGENAME''' (the Wikipedia article's title) * ''showname'' is the text to display with the above link. Defaults to ''pagename''. * The {{para|position}} parameter accepts one keyword, left, to float the box to the left instead of to the right. ==Example== {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} {{Wikispecies|Callithrix saterei|Satéré Marmoset}} ==Location== [[File:Sister link template columns problem.jpg|thumb|If using a large, graphical template produces odd layout problems, like the excessive white space shown on the right of this screenshot, then switch to a different sister template.]] {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section all by itself.''' {{xmark}} '''Do not place this template in a section containing columns without floating left.''' This template should normally be placed at the ''top'' of the ==External links== section at the end of an article, if the article has a section for [[WP:EL|external links]]. If no such section exists, then please place it at the top of the last section in the article, or use {{tlx|Wikispecies-inline}}. See [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia sister projects]] for further recommendations about the best choice of template for various situations. On [[WP:DAB|disambiguation pages]], this template should be listed above other text, but below any cleanup templates, images, infoboxes or navboxes. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Creates a small box with a links to an article on Wikispecies.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Page name", "description": "The page name on Wikispecies. The article's page name is used as a default.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "2": { "label": "Displayed name", "description": "Optional displayed link text.", "type": "string", "required": false }, "position": { "label": "Position", "description": "Position to display the box: 'left' floats the box to the left rather than the default which is on the right.", "type": "string", "required": false } }} ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
